name: NovaTheme
description: Custom homepage and header design for PlentyONE/Ceres shops, inspired by a modern B2B manufacturer layout (hero slider, mega menu, promo tiles, insights, contact section, footer, floating actions). Ships as a content-only add-on plugin that layers into Ceres via layout containers - it does not replace or fork Ceres.

shortDescription.de: Individuelle Startseite und Header fuer PlentyONE/Ceres Shops
shortDescription.en: Custom homepage and header for PlentyONE/Ceres shops

author: Client

dataProviders.name: NovaTheme header
dataProviders.description: Renders the custom NovaTheme header (desktop navigation, products mega menu, mobile drawer) in place of the default Ceres header.

dataProviders.name: NovaTheme homepage
dataProviders.description: Renders the custom NovaTheme homepage (hero slider, promo tiles, company introduction, insights, contact section, floating actions) in place of the default Ceres marketing homepage.

dataProviders.name: NovaTheme footer
dataProviders.description: Renders the custom NovaTheme footer (group branding, link columns, legal row, social links) in place of the default Ceres footer.

dataProviders.name: NovaTheme stylesheet
dataProviders.description: Includes the compiled NovaTheme stylesheet in the document head.

dataProviders.name: NovaTheme scripts
dataProviders.description: Includes the NovaTheme JavaScript modules (sticky header, mega menu, mobile drawer, hero slider, contact modal, footer accordion, floating actions).
